agent_checks.notes: Root mission contract with no mutable paths — trivially converged. Verified via child contracts.

post_conditions.description: Guest E2E: all public routes return non-500; course browsing and filtering works; login/registration/inquiries/forgot-password flows work; route protection enforced
post_conditions.evidence: tests/Browser/guest/route-smoke.spec.js (9 routes); tests/Browser/course-browsing.spec.js; tests/Browser/auth/login.spec.js; tests/Browser/guest/inquiries.spec.js; tests/Browser/guest/forgot-password.spec.js; tests/Browser/auth/route-protection.spec.js

post_conditions.description: Student E2E: all MyPage sections accessible via navigation; profile editable; course history, purchase history, wallet history, certificates, badges pages load; attendance flow renders
post_conditions.evidence: tests/Browser/auth/student-mypage.spec.js; tests/Browser/auth/student-profile.spec.js; tests/Browser/auth/student-history.spec.js; tests/Browser/auth/student-courses.spec.js

post_conditions.description: Teacher E2E: class applications CRUD works; manage class tabs render; airdrop button visible; teaching schedules page loads
post_conditions.evidence: tests/Browser/teacher/class-applications.spec.js; tests/Browser/teacher/manage-classes.spec.js; tests/Browser/teacher/teaching-history.spec.js:72-84 (airdrop button)

post_conditions.description: Admin E2E: profile and user management functional; inquiries and class applications manageable; all settings pages render and accept CRUD; refunds and wallet history pages load; admin navigation smoke test passes
post_conditions.evidence: tests/Browser/admin/profile-users.spec.js; tests/Browser/admin/inquiries-applications.spec.js; tests/Browser/admin/settings-crud.spec.js; tests/Browser/admin/settings-misc.spec.js; tests/Browser/admin/navigation-smoke.spec.js

invariants.description: No external service dependencies in tests
invariants.evidence: page.route() stubs all Blockfrost/Stripe endpoints in wallet-cip30.spec.js; zero real network calls

invariants.description: Graceful skip when seed data absent
invariants.evidence: test.skip() used consistently: course-browsing.spec.js:73, student-history.spec.js:41, teacher/manage-classes.spec.js:52
playwright.config.js:48-49 student/teacher/admin projects declare dependencies on setup scripts

invariants.description: Destructive admin actions only on test-created data
invariants.evidence: settings-crud.spec.js uses Date.now() / random slugs for all destructive CRUD; no operations on seeded fixture IDs

agent_checks.summary: All 4 post-conditions converged. All invariants passed. 6/6 acceptance criteria satisfied.

fast_checks.description: No legacy points nav link in AdminNavbar (F-11.4)
No legacy points nav link in Navbar (F-11.4)
No legacy points nav in MyPageSideBar (F-11.2)
No legacy points UI in StudentsTable (F-11.1)
No legacy points UI in Exams/Create (F-11.1)
No legacy points UI in Exams/Result (F-11.1)

post_conditions.description: No UI element referencing points, point balances, point earning, or point redemption is visible to any actor on any screen
post_conditions.evidence: UserPoints.jsx deleted entirely; exhaustive search for pointBalance, point_balance, earnPoints, redeemPoints, ポイント across all JSX/JS files — zero matches. Exam score 'points' fields exempted per contract.

post_conditions.description: No navigation element in any sidebar, menu, or breadcrumb references points
post_conditions.evidence: Full reads of MyPageSideBar.jsx, AdminNavbar.jsx, Navbar.jsx — no points nav entries

post_conditions.description: URLs previously associated with the points system redirect to appropriate existing pages; no points content rendered at those URLs
post_conditions.evidence: No points routes in routes/web.php or routes/api.php — no points content rendered. No affirmative redirect declarations found. Former points paths return 404, not 301/302. Positive redirect claim unmet.

post_conditions.description: Shared components (Navbar, AdminNavbar, MyPageSideBar, user profiles, dashboards) contain no points-related content, badges, counters, or labels
post_conditions.evidence: Full reads of AdminNavbar.jsx, Navbar.jsx, MyPageSideBar.jsx, MyPage.jsx, Users/View.jsx, StudentsTable.jsx — zero points references

post_conditions.description: Investigation of background processes referencing points is complete; any found are disabled
post_conditions.evidence: Exhaustive search: app/Console/Kernel.php (single job: purchases:timeout), Console/Commands (4 files), app/Mail (11 files), app/Notifications — zero points references. app/Jobs/ does not exist.

invariants.description: Backend code for points must NOT be modified
invariants.evidence: Hygiene commit touched only resources/js/ files; no app/, database/ files modified
No migration files added by hygiene work

agent_checks.summary: F-11.3 partial: former points URLs return 404 rather than affirmative redirect. All other post-conditions converged.

post_conditions.description: Class pages display JPY price and live ADA equivalent; ADA refreshes every 60s; drift >5% alerts user; rate unavailability disables ADA path gracefully
post_conditions.evidence: Details.jsx:60-96 60s poll; :86-88 5% drift alert; :764 ADA button disabled independently; :626-631 dual price display

post_conditions.description: ADA purchase via CIP-30 double-sign flow; pending shows X/10 confirmations; access granted after 10 confirmations; duplicate attempts blocked
post_conditions.evidence: Details.jsx:209 signTx; :717-726 LinearProgress; CoursePurchaseService.php:330-346 10-conf gate; :197-206 lockForUpdate duplicate check

post_conditions.description: Stripe checkout flow; class access granted immediately on successful charge; Japan-compliant
post_conditions.evidence: StripeService.php:241-308 creates CourseHistory on payment_intent.succeeded; CourseController.php:158 null payment_status = booked immediately

post_conditions.description: Both payment options presented in parallel; either path degrades independently
post_conditions.evidence: Details.jsx:760-824 independent disabled conditions; captions shown per-path when unavailable

post_conditions.description: CIP-30 wallet connect/disconnect handled; unsupported wallets show clear error; wrong network blocks; pending transactions monitored after disconnect
post_conditions.evidence: WalletConnector.jsx:256-268 unsupported error; :305-316 wrong network; :115-137 heartbeat; Details.jsx:136-159 polling independent of walletAPI

post_conditions.description: Admin initiates Stripe and ADA refunds; class access revoked; rewards flagged; Admin and Student notified
post_conditions.evidence: Refund paths and revocation/flagging confirmed. Gap: RewardInvalidationService.php:76-83 notifications only fire when force=true and rewards exist. Base refund (no rewards) emits no notification to admin or student.

post_conditions.description: Cardano network status (healthy/degraded/unreachable) reflected in ADA payment UI
post_conditions.evidence: CardanoController.php:12-18; Details.jsx:99-114 60s poll; :754 CardanoNetworkStatus component rendered

post_conditions.description: Students view purchase history with ADA tx hash, X/10 status, Stripe receipt entries including pending and refunded states
post_conditions.evidence: PurchaseHistoryTable.jsx:77-93 tx hash and receipt links; :26 refunded chip. Gap: :146 pending confirmation count hardcoded as '?' instead of live X/10 value.

invariants.description: No class access before 10 ADA confirmations or Stripe success
invariants.evidence: CoursePurchaseService.php:330-346; Stripe only creates CourseHistory on payment_intent.succeeded
CoursePurchaseService.php:113-118 Cache TTL; :150-153 cache miss returns quoteExpired:true
Details.jsx:209 only signTx browser-side; submit-purchase-tx.mjs:41-44 server-side merge

invariants.description: Recipient addresses use custodial HD derivation

agent_checks.summary: 6/8 post-conditions converged, 2 partial. F-13 partial: refund notifications absent for base (no-rewards) refund path. F-15 partial: PurchaseHistoryTable.jsx:146 hardcodes '?/10' instead of live confirmation count.

post_conditions.description: Teachers enable/configure/disable NFT certificate reward; incomplete metadata rejected; config locked at enrollment
post_conditions.evidence: CourseRequest.php:42-45 certificate_name and certificate_description required_if. Enrollment lock via effectiveCertificateName(). Gap: certificate_image_url is nullable even when certificate_enabled — incomplete metadata (no image) passes validation.

post_conditions.description: Teachers enable/configure/disable token reward; invalid amounts rejected; config locked at enrollment
post_conditions.evidence: CourseRequest.php:47 required_if|integer|min:1|max:1000000; effectiveTokenRewardAmount() used in StudentMintController.php:156,336

post_conditions.description: NFT and token rewards configured independently and delivered together in a single airdrop
post_conditions.evidence: Independent config confirmed. Gap: Certificates.jsx:79 posts to certificates-only endpoint. No combined NFT+token single-call airdrop. Token rewards require separate action.

post_conditions.description: Batch/selective airdrop with fee estimate before confirmation; partial failures listed with retry; duplicate prevention; platform wallet pays; teacher wallet not required
post_conditions.evidence: AirdropFeeDialog.jsx fully implemented; AirdropResultsDialog lists partial failures; handleRetryFailed at Certificates.jsx:115-119; platform wallet pays. Gap 1: AirdropFeeDialog never imported/rendered in Certificates.jsx — confirmation dialog shows only count, no fee estimate. Gap 2: CertificateService.php:670 duplicate check has no lockForUpdate(), leaving TOCTOU race.

post_conditions.description: Refund triggers on-chain metadata update flagging NFT as revoked + platform revocation; token flagged for clawback in course_histories
post_conditions.evidence: Platform revocation: RewardInvalidationService.php:63 certificate_status='revoked', :69 token_reward_status='clawback_flagged'. Drift 1: No on-chain revocation script in web3/run/ — admin notification at line 140 says 'Manual on-chain action may be required'. Drift 2: RewardInvalidationService.php:47 certDelivered check only includes ['minted'] — 'self_minted' excluded, so CIP-30 self-minted certs are NOT revoked on refund.

post_conditions.description: Students view all earned rewards with type, amount, delivery status, and wallet destination
post_conditions.evidence: CertificateService.php:724 getStudentRewards returns all fields; RewardsTable.jsx:24-32 STATUS_CONFIG covers all statuses; columns at :254-260

post_conditions.description: Students with CIP-30 wallet self-mint NFT cert or token reward paying ~1 ADA; fallback custodial mint; self_minted status recorded
post_conditions.evidence: RewardsTable.jsx:85-143 and CourseCompleteConfirmation.jsx:84-145 implement full CIP-30 flow. StudentMintController.php:403-408 server-side witness merge. Custodial fallback at RewardsTable.jsx:148-163. self_minted ENUM at migration 2026_03_10_000001:11-13. Status at StudentMintController.php:57-58.

post_conditions.description: Eligibility notification shown immediately on class completion; eligibility badge on completed class page; cleared after reward receipt
post_conditions.evidence: CertificateService.php:405 dispatchCompletionNotificationIfEligible fires idempotently. CourseCompleteConfirmation.jsx:455-471 shows rewards block. Gap 1: No eligibility badge found on class attendance/course page (distinct from completion confirmation page). Gap 2: No frontend logic to clear badge display after reward receipt.

invariants.description: Only completed students eligible for airdrop/self-mint
Minting policy supports on-chain metadata updates for revocation
invariants.evidence: web3/contracts/nft-minting-policy.hl unchanged; same parameterised policy used

invariants.description: Platform wallet pays all airdrop fees; teacher wallet never charged
invariants.evidence: CertificateService.php:182 runs build-certificate-tx.mjs server-side using OWNER_WALLET_ADDR

invariants.description: CIP-30 self-mint uses partial sign flow
invariants.evidence: build-student-certificate-tx.mjs:155 owner partial sign; RewardsTable.jsx:115 student signTx(cborTx, true); submit-signed-tx.mjs:19-26 reconstructs and submits

invariants.description: Duplicate reward delivery prevented at data layer
invariants.evidence: CertificateService.php:670 duplicate check is read-then-act with no lockForUpdate(). StudentMintController.php:101-109 status check also lacks DB lock. TOCTOU race possible for concurrent requests.

agent_checks.summary: F-16 drifted: no on-chain revocation script; self_minted certificates excluded from revocation path. F-07, F-10, F-05, F-19 partial. Duplicate-prevention invariant violated (missing lockForUpdate). F-06, F-17, F-18 converged.
